name: Path Equivalence: 'file name' (Internal Whitespace)
description: The product does not properly handle paths containing internal whitespace characters, which different systems may interpret differently — some treating spaces as literal filename characters, others as delimiters — allowing attackers to bypass path-based access controls.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with internal whitespace that the CONTROL[path_check] and STORAGE[file_access] resolve differently, creating a check-vs-use mismatch that bypasses intended restrictions
